messages.content: You are a helpful, concise assistant.
Give me a simple spaghetti arrabbiata recipe in exactly two sentences. No extra commentary or tips.
Heat a skillet over medium heat, sauté minced garlic and red pepper flakes in olive oil, then stir in crushed tomatoes with a pinch of salt and simmer until slightly thickened
